commit.message:
* fix verification at end of concurrent start pause
  * apply_to_marked_objects() did not consider humongous objects
  * can not check TAMS and live bytes to be a particular value because some regions legitimately have TAMS set and some already marked bytes
* ayang review; did not add a comment because the comment for root regions explains them well enough.

8381939

Hi all,

  please review this fix that fixes some verification that has always been broken, but never(?) actually exeucted. With the upcoming JDK-8381413 it will be executed, and after-gc verification will almost always fail during a concurrent start gc.

See the CR description for more detail.

Testing: gha, does not fail with upcoming JDK-8381413 any more

Thanks,
  Thomas
